notes: Valheim Data — Sausages now tagged Swamp (craftable from Swamp onward, not Mistlands-only). Armor set name shown next to subcategory in both card and table search views. Workbench Builds get two synthetic buckets — Vehicle (Cart, Drakkar, Longship, Karve, Raft) and Siege — surfaced beside the existing crafted items. BuildPiece subcategories renamed to match the in-game hammer menu: Misc → Miscellaneous, Crafting Station → Crafting, Stone Building → Heavy Build (Building and Furniture unchanged).
